tools.name: create_bar_session
tools.description: Create a new Tabula Bar chart authoring session from a dataset and optional BarSpec draft.

tools.name: get_bar_control_surface
tools.description: Return the current Bar control surface, dataset schema, warnings, and normalized session snapshot.

tools.name: set_bar_orientation
tools.description: Update the Bar chart orientation using the public Bar contract.

tools.name: set_bar_series_layout
tools.description: Update the Bar chart series layout using the public Bar contract.

tools.name: set_bar_mapping
tools.description: Update the Bar chart mapping for category, value, and group slots.

tools.name: set_bar_sort
tools.description: Update Bar chart sort settings with the normalized public contract.

tools.name: set_bar_filters
tools.description: Update Bar chart filters with the normalized public contract.

tools.name: create_bar_calculated_field
tools.description: Create a calculated field inside the current Bar session dataset.

tools.name: update_bar_style
tools.description: Apply a normalized Bar style patch to the current session.

tools.name: configure_bar_growth
tools.description: Configure the Bar growth complication using the public MCP-facing payload.

tools.name: clear_bar_growth
tools.description: Remove the Bar growth complication from the current session.

tools.name: configure_bar_reference_line
tools.description: Configure the Bar reference line complication using the public MCP-facing payload.

tools.name: clear_bar_reference_line
tools.description: Remove the Bar reference line complication from the current session.

tools.name: render_bar_png
tools.description: Render the current Bar chart session to a PNG using Tabula headless export.

tools.name: open_bar_in_tabula
tools.description: Build a local Tabula editor handoff URL for the current Bar session without persisting a project.
